options.description: Auto-indent after opening brace. When { is typed at the end of a selector or at-rule, insert a newline and increase indentation.
Outdent closing brace to match the indentation of the opening brace, and insert a blank line after the rule block.
On semicolon, normalize the current declaration line: ensure single space after the colon and trim trailing whitespace.
On newline, maintain the same indentation level as the previous non-empty line within the current rule block.
On newline after an opening brace, increase indentation by one level for the next line.
When typing a colon after a property name, ensure there is a space after the colon before the value.
After typing semicolon at the end of a declaration, optionally prepare the cursor on a new indented line for the next property.
After a closing brace, insert one blank line to visually separate rule blocks.
